subcodes.first_line: The Lamp before the Countenance lamenteth with the lamentation of the bereaved for My loved ones, and saith: "O Name of God, I know not..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان السراج قدام الوجه ینوح کنوح الثکلی لاولیائی و یقول یا اسم الله لم ادر فی
subcodes.subjects: @the power of words; of speech, @suffering and imprisonment, @exhortations and counsels, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
